name: Tech Sector Cap
prompt: Technology sector exposure must not exceed 40% of total portfolio value

name: Single Stock Limit
prompt: No single stock position should exceed 8% of total portfolio value

name: QQQ Alignment Target
prompt: Maintain at least 70% alignment with QQQ top 10 holdings weighted allocation

name: Minimum Cash Buffer
prompt: Always maintain at least 3% of portfolio value in cash
